Production-ready VPN commerce stack

AltShop

Telegram bot, FastAPI backend, and React web portal for selling VPN subscriptions with Remnawave integration.

Telegram dashboard
14 payment gateways
Partner & referral flows
Docker + Nginx deploy
Control plane
Bot admin + web cabinet
Core stack
FastAPI, React 19, PostgreSQL, Valkey
Designed for
VPN storefronts, operators, resellers
github.com/dizzzable/altshop v1.0.1
